category_sources: source_facts.description identifies inadyn as a Dynamic DNS client with IPv4, IPv6, and SSL/TLS support; official project page is source_facts.homepage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is inadyn; official Troglobit/GitHub materials use Inadyn/In-a-Dyn for the project.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs domain was found; the official GitHub README and Troglobit project page are the best official documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies Dynamic DNS, IPv4, IPv6, and SSL/TLS; source_facts.executables lists inadyn as a CLI executable.
